questionHtml: Identify the slope of the supply curve.
markschemeHtml:
Slope = 4.5 OR + 4.5 (or 1/4.5 or 2/9)

An answer of 4.5 or + 4.5 (or 1/4.5 or 2/9) without any working is sufficient for [1].

meta.title: Identify the slope of the supply curve.
breadcrumbLabels: Linear supply functions, equations and graphs
